jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Netmeds
jsonLd.description:
Netmeds invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Netmeds:
Netmeds is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netmeds!
